input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8600 [Automation] javac compile fails for org.codehaus.plexus:plexus-archiver:2.6; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015

risks: The reported javac failure comes from the existing 2.5 test calling org.codehaus.plexus.components.io.attributes.Java7Reflector.isJava7(), which is not present in plexus-io 2.1 used by plexus-archiver 2.6; generated tests should avoid that removed method rather than adding setup.

Older zip/jar code in plexus-archiver 2.6 has brittle java.version-dependent timestamp logic, so exact ZIP timestamp assertions on modern JDKs may be fragile; this is a test-design risk, not a setup requirement.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: plexus-archiver 2.6 is a local archive manipulation library; its required runtime dependencies resolve transitively and meaningful tests can use temporary files without external services, Docker, extra Maven dependencies, or required environment/system properties.
